title: ReplyOutput
description: A drafted reply in the user's voice, with metadata for downstream automation.

reply.description: The drafted message, ready to send.

style_confidence.description: Honest estimate that this reply would pass the clone test against the user's real writing.

reasoning.description: 1-2 sentences explaining which profile traits drove this draft.

alternatives.description: Optional alternative drafts (shorter, harder push, different angle).

warnings.description: Issues the model wants to flag (e.g., thin profile, off-topic, ethical concern).
